title: agrostis canina f. elatior
intro: Agrostis canina f. elatior, also known as red topped bent grass, is a variant of the Agrostis canina plant, which is a type of grass native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, which can be used to treat various health issues such as urinary tract infections, skin conditions, and wounds. The health benefits of Agrostis canina f. elatior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits or applied topically to treat skin conditions.
